data.title: Kai Douryoku
data.synopsis: Not much is known about the piece compared to its award-winning "Real" counterpart made 4 years later.

data.title: Kai Douryoku Real
data.synopsis: Montage of the human body fusing stop-motion and computer animation into a bizzare scifi representation. It was shown at the Japanese Media Arts Festival and got the Excellence Award. And it won the Special Jury Prize in the Off Theatre Competition at the 10th Yubari International Fantastic Film Festival.
data.background: Winner of the Excellence Award at the 2nd Japan Media Arts Festival.

titles.title: ちぃちゃんとヒゲおじさん

data.title: Chii-chan to Hige Ojisan
data.title_japanese: ちぃちゃんとヒゲおじさん
data.synopsis: A simple slice of life kids claymation about Chii-chan and her bearded uncle and their neighborhood animals friends.

data.title: Momonga-mon
data.synopsis: Stop-motion animation about a mysterious creature Mont-chan from an unknown world looking for an adventure.

data.title: Shiroi Hon
data.synopsis: Papercraft stop-motion animation featuring tales ranging from a colourful jungle to a sports car race.

titles.title: ピンキーわくわく旅ストロ

data.title: Pinky Wakuwaku Tabi Stroll
data.title_japanese: ピンキーわくわく旅ストロ
data.synopsis: A promotional anime for Frente International's Pinky candy featuring their [pink] monkey mascot bring happiness through the power of Pinky candy in honor of the Pinky Citron Mint flavour release.

titles.title: ピンキーモンキーの生まれた日

data.title: Pinky Monkey no Umareta Hi
data.title_japanese: ピンキーモンキーの生まれた日
data.synopsis: Produced by Kenji Eno, commissioned by Frente International, this short shows the birth of Pinky.

data.title: Fafa Movie
data.synopsis:
A promotional anime for Nissan Soap's Fafa laundry mascot. These two ONA films were promoting the AiR Fafa project. The project itself was a type of augmented reality app that people could play with.

North American viewers may recognize Fafa under a different name "Snuggle". The mascot for the fabric softener brand owned by Sun Products.

titles.title: Pinky Monkey x FaFa Collaboration Animation: At Afternoon of Sunny Day
Pinky Monkey x Snuggle Collaboration Douga: At Afternoon of Sunny Day
ピンキーモンキー x ファーファ コラボ動画 - at afternoon of sunny day -
Fafa x Pinky Monkey: at afternoon of sunny day

data.title: Pinky Monkey x FaFa Collaboration Animation: At Afternoon of Sunny Day
data.title_english: Fafa x Pinky Monkey: at afternoon of sunny day
data.title_japanese: ピンキーモンキー x ファーファ コラボ動画 - at afternoon of sunny day -
title_synonyms: Pinky Monkey x Snuggle Collaboration Douga: At Afternoon of Sunny Day
data.synopsis:
A collaboration anime between Frente International's Pinky candy mascot and Nissan Soap's Fafa laundry mascot.

North American viewers may recognize Fafa under a different name "Snuggle". The mascot for the fabric softener brand owned by Sun Products.

data.title: Ousama Monogatari
data.synopsis: Stop-motion animation made out of fabric following a curious king sneaking out of his castle.

data.title: Shiritori Oukoku
data.synopsis: Stop-motion animation about forest animals lives told through shiritori.

data.title: Oni Keibu Anpan
data.synopsis: CG anime about a scary but kind hearted police man doing his job.

titles.title: 十人の小さなインディアン

data.title: Juu-nin no Chiisa na Indian
data.title_japanese: 十人の小さなインディアン
data.synopsis: Short film by Tadanari Okamoto set to the tune of "Ten Little Indians".

data.title: 12-gatsu no Uta
data.synopsis: Short film by Tadanari Okamoto originally projected on three screens, and re-edited for domestic release many years later, set to a poem by Noriko Ibaraki of the same name.

data.title: Dog Days Recap
data.synopsis: Recap of the first two seasons of Dog Days series narrated by Mikako Takahashi. Aired simultaneously with the first episode of the third season.

Pocket Monsters XY New Year's Eve 2014 Super Mega Special!!
data.synopsis: Recap episode.

data.title: Liv & Bell
data.synopsis: A stop-motion animation about Liv, a curious little girl and Bell, a gluttonous hedgehog. Together they go on an adventure in a picture book.

data.title: En En Nikoli
data.synopsis: Nikoli-chan is a curious and a crybaby. She explores the places surrounding her home but if she doesn't get her way she throws a tantrum.

data.title: Teach
data.synopsis: Teach is a curious monkey who travels the world listening to funny stories and listening to a wide variety of music.

data.title: Mori no Ratio
data.synopsis: Stop-motion anime about a girl named Ratio who lives in a forest with her icy monsters and creatures. Every day she goes out explores new things.

titles.title: Byururu to Mahou no Straw Theater

data.title: Straw Byururu
title_synonyms: Byururu to Mahou no Straw Theater
data.synopsis: Byururu came from the straw world. At night the kitchen turns into a magical forest inhabited by witches. Here Byururu sets out on an adventure.

titles.title: エディ・ザ・ファーストブレイク

data.title: Eddie the Fast Break
data.title_japanese: エディ・ザ・ファーストブレイク
data.synopsis: Eddie is a frog who loves basketball. He tries to teach fellow kids how to play and tries to use his court skills off the court and gets mixed results.

data.title: Ken to Kaijuu
data.synopsis: What if the boogie monster was a kaijuu? What if the kaijuu was here to keep you company? Well that's what Ken gets when a kaijuu comes out of his closet door.

titles.title: おんがく世界りょこう

data.title: Ongaku Sekai Ryokou
data.title_japanese: おんがく世界りょこう
data.synopsis: Stop-motion animation using clay and puppets follows a musician and hit cat traveling the world and learning about music in different cultures while spreading their own songs.

titles.title: Meitantei Conan: Kinga Shinnen Mouri Kogorou
名探偵コナン 特別編 「謹賀新年 毛利小五郎」
Detective Conan: Happy New Year Special

data.title: Meitantei Conan: Kinga Shinnen Mouri Kogorou
data.title_english: Detective Conan: Happy New Year Special
data.title_japanese: 名探偵コナン 特別編 「謹賀新年 毛利小五郎」
data.synopsis: Special episode consisting of two short stories. The first being an expanded version of Detective Conan: The Fugitive Kogorou Mouri, which was never aired on TV till now. The second half being a brand new New Years Day segment.
